subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto those possessed of knowledge who have stood firm in the Cause in such wise that hearts were thereby drawn and attracted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لقوم یعلمون و استقاموا علی الامر علی شان بها انجذبت الافئده و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
